title: Post creation, media handling, and CLI
description: Implement broadside post --persona=NAME CONTENT with options: --markdown (read stdin, render via pulldown-cmark), --media=PATH (multiple allowed). Media processing: validate image MIME (sniff, not trust extension), enforce 10MB max, strip EXIF, compute blurhash, store in media/ dir. Insert posts and post_media rows. Generate snowflake IDs. Dedup via source_ref UNIQUE constraint.
close_reason: Post creation, WebFinger/NodeInfo, actor/outbox/followers endpoints all implemented and smoke-tested
